steps.title: Focus on the cause
steps.content: The question asks why Billy Budd, Sailor entered the public domain. The notes give the causal rule: when a book's copyright expires, the book enters the public domain. The best choice must explain that cause-and-effect relationship.

steps.title: Reject noncausal choices
steps.content: Choice A describes what was true before public-domain entry. Choice B describes the book's current availability. Choice C describes what people can do after a book enters the public domain. None of those explains why the entry happened. The remaining choice states that copyright expiration caused the novella to enter the public domain. The answer is D.
